top_signals.title: Goldman Sachs: Oil Price Swings Hurt China Manufacturing
top_signals.summary: Hui Shan, Chief China Economist at Goldman Sachs, says oil price fluctuations due to the war in Iran have negatively affected China's factory activity, which showed signs of weakness in May. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Turkey’s Economy Surprises With Slower Than Expected Growth
top_signals.summary: Turkey’s economy grew slower than expected in the first quarter, signaling that the the fallout from the Iran war is weighing on activity.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: US general holds rare meeting with Cuban military officials near Guantanamo Bay
top_signals.summary: The meeting is the first in recent memory by a head of U.S. Southern Command and comes amid growing concerns in Cuba of a possible U.S. military attack.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Swiss Economy Grew Less Than Estimated at Start of the Year
top_signals.summary: Switzerland’s economy grew slightly less than initially reported in the first quarter, weighed down by stalling consumer demand and a drop in investment.
